name: Sweet Sour Veggies
recipeIngredient: 20 oz. can pineapple chunks in their own juice
1 bunch scallions, cut into 1 inch pieces
1 large green pepper, cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple, reserving the juice.
2. In a large pot or wok, sauté the onion, scallions, garlic, and ginger in half the water for 5 minutes.
3. Add the carrots, broccoli, and remaining water to the pot. Stir and cover, then cook over low heat for 5 minutes.
4. Combine all sauce ingredients in a separate bowl.
5. Stir the pineapple chunks and sauce mixture into the vegetables. Cook until thickened.
Serves: 6
